title: Windsurf Arena Mode
summary: Windsurf added Arena Mode to let you pit models against each other blind-voted to find what actually works for YOUR code, not just benchmarks.
takeaway: Side-by-side AI model comparison right in your IDE

title: Claude Opus 4.6
summary: Claude got smarter at long-context tasks & debugging unfamiliar codebases. 1M token window (beta) means you can actually keep massive projects in memory.
takeaway: 1M context window for serious coding work

title: Google Gemini workspace updates
summary: Gemini in Workspace can now generate full docs, sheets & presentations by pulling context from your emails, chats & files. Basically turned Drive into an active knowledge base.
takeaway: AI that reads your entire Google Drive & builds docs from it
